description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-24.04 to build and test with multiple compilers and versions, ensuring only one job runs at a time and cancelling in-progress jobs for the same workflow, job, and ref. For each matrix entry, install the required compiler, checkout code, set up a mamba environment, configure the build with CMake, build the project, and run tests.
